title: Terminal Block Price in Pakistan 2026 — DIN Rail Wiring Duct Panel Wiring Accessories Complete Buyer Guide
meta_description: Terminal block price in Pakistan 2026: PT1.5 Rs. 35–400/pc | PT2.5 Rs. 45–550/pc | PT4 Rs. 70–750/pc. Wiring duct 25×25mm Rs. 180–450/m. Spring-clamp vs screw-clamp, ferrule crimping, WAPDA panel compliance. All brands compared.
